narrativeProgression.summary: A witness goes dark after confirming a hidden ledger.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts.

threadUpdates.update: Ultimatum Window: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts.
Peripheral signal tied to Anonymous tip voicemail remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Anonymous tip voicemail.
A plausible shortcut appears: Protect survivor vs bait killer with false lead.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: Red Creek Winter - Day 16 text message screenshot
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Anonymous tip voicemail.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter ARG artifact Day 16. Type: text_message_screenshot. Clue focus: Anonymous tip voicemail. Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Red Creek Winter text_message_screenshot audio cue for day 16. Clue anchor: Anonymous tip voicemail. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Anonymous tip voicemail and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_15.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Anonymous tip voicemail.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.

puzzle.title: Day 16 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Anonymous tip voicemail.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with ANON.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Antagonist sends a personalized pressure message and witness trust drops.

distraction.title: Red Herring 16
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Anonymous tip voicemail with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
